study.publication_title: Preclinical safety evaluation of body protective compound-157, a potential drug for treating various wounds

evidence_summary: A dedicated preclinical safety publication has been identified. It cannot substitute for adequately powered long-term human safety evidence.
limitations: Animal toxicology is not equivalent to human clinical safety.
Full protocol, dose margins and detailed findings require direct primary extraction.
